name: UCP Cart Capability
description: New optional UCP capability (March 2026) enabling AI agents to save or add multiple items to a shopping cart at once from a single store, matching how human shoppers typically behave.

name: UCP Catalog Capability
description: New optional UCP capability (March 2026) allowing AI agents to retrieve real-time product details from retailer catalogs, including variants, inventory, and pricing.

name: UCP Identity Linking
description: UCP capability (March 2026) that lets shoppers carry loyalty and member benefits (pricing, free shipping) across UCP-integrated platforms by preserving logged-in identity.
